title: Server Hardcore
description: A simple mod that makes a new world every time a player dies in hardcore.
body:
# Makes a new world every time any of the players die.
I bet you know the feeling of making a new hardcore world every time one of your friends dies—over and over and over again.
If only there were a simple way to just automatically skip all of the world-making trouble...

### Well, look no further, because that's exactly what this mod does!
By having this mod installed, you no longer need to worry about making a new world each time!

Now, every time someone dies, the server will simply restart itself and create an 
entirely new world!                   
**completely free of your or your friends deadly mistakes!**

# Important!

The world needs to be in hardcore in order to work, if it won't work in hardcore check if either server.properties or level.dat have hardcore enabled


<details>
<summary>Default Configurations</summary>
  
```"anonymousDeaths=false"``` Won't show the dead player's name when being kicked.

```"customKickMessage= has died! The world is being reset..."``` Displays a message after the player's name in the kick message.

```"newTerminalOnRestart=true"``` Opens a new terminal every restart to make it more clear if the server is starting up.

```"startFilePath=start.bat"``` Specifices the server's startup file. Doesn't restart the server if left empty.

</details>
